document.name: Brooklyn Conservatory of Music — Sing & Play
document.shortDescription: Caregiver-and-me early childhood music at BKCM (6 months–2 years): singing, listening, and small percussion in a 16-week group class with weekday and Saturday sections.
document.longDescription:
Sing & Play at the Brooklyn Conservatory of Music (BKCM) is an early childhood group class for children about six months to two years old with a caregiver. The official class page describes singing, listening, and playing small percussion while building motor skills, with a 16-week term structure and online registration through BKCM’s registration systems.

Published sections on the Sing & Play page: Saturdays 10:30–11:15 a.m.; Wednesdays 9:30–10:15 a.m. and 10:30–11:15 a.m. The page lists Price: $688 for the term (see missingOrUncertain — this is term tuition, not a per-visit drop-in price). Class size is listed as 8; instructor listed as Laura Angyal. The early-childhood overview page links here and notes limited Spring 2026 availability for Sing & Play.

BKCM’s contact page lists the building at 58 Seventh Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11217; phone 718-622-3300; email info@bkcm.org. Transit notes on the contact page include B/Q to Seventh Avenue or 2/3 to Grand Army Plaza with walking directions to Seventh Avenue and Lincoln Place.

Hero image in ClassScout is a copy of the official Sing & Play promotional JPEG from BKCM’s WordPress media (same artwork shown on the class page), re-hosted via ClassScout ingest upload to ImgBB for policy compliance.

Sources: https://bkcm.org/class-ensemble/sing-and-play/ https://bkcm.org/music-classes/early-childhood/ https://bkcm.org/contact/
document.announcementDescription: Official early-childhood page highlights limited Spring 2026 spots for Sing & Play; confirm schedules and registration on bkcm.org.
